sections.paragraph:
ὑπόστασις, εως, ἡ [ὑφίστημι (ὑπό, στάσις) ‘set under’]

—1. ‘a program for action’, venture, undertaking, project, of a pledge to help the poor 2 Cor 9:4; of designed engagement in boasting 11:17; of promised commitment to association with Christ Hb 3:14.

—2. ‘the quality of having actual existence’, reality Hb 1:3; 11:1.
